merchant_api_discovery.conclusion: ProductInputs v1 exposes insert/patch/delete but not get in the discovery document; GET attempts against productInputs/{id} are therefore not a reliable readback/ownership signal. Use accounts.products.get for final product output and productstatuses/account settings for diagnostics.

source_architecture_current.price_risk: can surface crawl-derived offer state, but no API write target
intended write target; price PATCH/upsert returned success but final Content readback did not persist for 109
local/LIA; not primary online price target

source_architecture_current.destinations: Display/Free/Shopping enabled in resource; Content API feed target also excludes Shopping in legacy view
source_architecture_current.price_risk: feed header has id,color,age_group,gender,size only; not direct price source

interpretation: Automatic item price updates are enabled/effective at account level; productstatuses confirm Google is auto-updating mismatched prices from the online store with servability unaffected.

ProductInputs GET returned 404 for all sampled source/dataSource combinations even though final products are readable; source ownership could not be proven at ProductInput-read level, so use final product + account auto-update + productstatus evidence.
Some fresh Merchant/Content reads now match Shopify target while productstatuses still show auto-update notices; status clearance can lag final product readback.
Some fresh final outputs remain stale vs Shopify target; those need source/feed regeneration or a tightly verified price/salePrice pilot after the ownership path is fixed.

target_architecture_recommendation.action_needed: identify upstream generator/channel that rewrites stale price before any new write

target_architecture_recommendation.target_role: safety/discovery only or tightly constrained fallback
target_architecture_recommendation.critical_attrs: should not be treated as operational price owner
target_architecture_recommendation.action_needed: do not disable yet; prepare UI/settings review packet before changing destinations/auto-update
keep but review destinations/primary-vs-supplemental behavior in Merchant UI

target_architecture_recommendation.critical_attrs: local offers; keep separate from online price remediation

recommended_next_step: Open a no-write source-governance packet: inspect Merchant UI/source settings and Shopify/Google channel/API generator ownership, then choose one of three approval gates: (A) leave auto-update safety and fix upstream API generator, (B) limit crawl/autofeed after rollback/screenshot packet, (C) temporary monitored settings experiment on a tiny exact cohort only.
